title: Lightstation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lightstations''' were a series of [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] equipped with navigation beacons in the [[Roon system/Legends|Roon system]]. Prior to the establishment of the [[Manda-Roon Merchant Route]] by [[Mungo Baobab]], these orbital platforms were few in number. [[Bisad Koong]], governor of [[Roon/Legends|Roon's]] [[Tawntoom]] province in the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], utilized a lightstation as an orbital base of operations.

Baobab apparently felt that the existing lightstations were an appropriate method to mark the rediscovered trade lane, and merely multiplied them in number to provide a more easily navigable path. Before the advent of the [[Baobab Merchant Fleet]] lightstation system, travelers had to follow close behind the [[rainbow comet]], a body that only traveled through the [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|Cloak of the Sith]] and into the Roon system once a year.

Although most lightstations were autonomous, one, the [[Umboo lightstation]] (named after Roon's [[Umboo]] province), was manned by an old [[Human/Legends|Human]] male named [[Noop Yeldarb]], who had maintained the station since its inception. It was Noop's duty, along with the [[Roon Trade Guild]], to ensure that the lightstations were not diverted for nefarious purposes - early in its establishment, the system was plagued by pirates who would alter the lightstations' positions, forcing prey into an easy ambush.

==Appearances==
